name: anna-local-host-lab
description: Local Anna-like host for App, Executa, ACL and privacy testing.

scripts.check: node --check src/app-registry.js && node --check src/executa-pool.js && node --check src/privacy.js && node --check src/host.js && node --check src/server.js && node --check desktop/main.mjs && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/anna-sdk.js && node --check playwright.config.js && node --check playwright.desktop.config.js && node --check tests/browser/host.spec.js && node --check tests/desktop/desktop.spec.js && node --check scripts/personal-assistant-host-smoke.mjs
